assertions.text: Opening paragraph addresses the projects core community or audience directly
Reward tier descriptions are specific about what the backer receives
No hyperbole such as revolutionary, life-changing, or groundbreaking

reward-tiers-specific.note: All four tiers specific: credits, digital copy, directors notes on 5 scenes, private Q&A
Tiers specific despite minimal input: credit, early episodes, behind-scenes content

community-address.note: Addresses maritime history and heritage community across three countries

reward-tiers-specific.note: Tiers describe specific deliverables tied to the 3-country scope

no-hyperbole.note: No hyperbole; appropriate register for European heritage audience
